MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Gorini, via Zoom, for Sam Lazarakis, Executor.

Counsel reports regarding having waivers of accounting from all beneficiaries and he should have a petition ready to file within the next 30 days. Counsel also advises that income taxes will be filed.

The matter is continued to Jun-08-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
